item.title: MixedNotes 0.225
item.description: Fixes the Mac auto-updater (it couldn't run the installer). Install this build by hand once; after that updates apply themselves. Includes the new '+ New Song' creator with AI bullet lists.

item.title: MixedNotes 0.224
item.description: Create songs right in the Mac app: new '+ New Song' button — type a title, add a text or voice note, and the on-device AI turns it into a checkable bullet list. Songs sync to your iPhone.

item.title: MixedNotes 0.222
item.description: Fixes the Mac app launching as 'damaged' on other Macs — for real this time (stray metadata files no longer ride along in the download). Clean, notarized build.

item.title: MixedNotes 0.221
item.description: Fixes the Mac app launching as 'damaged' on other Macs (stray metadata files were breaking the app's seal). Clean, notarized build.

item.title: MixedNotes 0.220
item.description: Fixes the Mac app being blocked by Gatekeeper ('damaged / move to Trash'): builds are now notarized by Apple and carry their real version. Replace this build by hand once; after that the app auto-updates itself.

item.title: MixedNotes 0.219
item.description:
Fixes the updater always reporting 'you're up to date': the app now carries its real version (0.219) instead of a stale 1.0, so future updates compare correctly.
Note: replace this build by hand once — after that the Mac app auto-updates itself.
Also: new flat techy-gray console look (capsule tabs, hardware buttons) with the orange accents kept for notes and songs.

item.title: MixedNotes 0.218
item.description:
New Mac look: flat techy-gray console chrome (SpliceMover style) — capsule tabs, hardware buttons, LED toggles — with the original orange accents kept for notes and songs.
Also includes the bug-hunt fixes: clearer Dropbox connection errors, self-healing folder bookmarks.

item.title: MixedNotes 0.216
item.description:
First Sparkle-updatable release.
- Waveform strip under the liquid circle: real per-song waveform, reflection, drag to seek - Touch-reactive liquid with true water physics (flick, glide, tilt) - Apple Watch app: one-tap audio notes pinned to the playing song - Optional: keep music playing (ducked) while dictating - Mac app auto-updates from this release onward (Sparkle, sandboxed) - Many fixes: persistent design dials, Dropbox connection errors, stale folder bookmarks
